title: Modernized Mekanism
description: A resource pack which fixes and improves Mekanism sprites.
body:
This is a currently WIP resource pack which aims to resprite a majority of Mekanism textures to fix things like mixed pixel sizes, as well as making the mod fit better with modern Minecraft's style.

REQUIRES [CTM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm) FOR CONNECTED TEXTURES

As of now, the main things that have been resprited are items, but eventually many of the machines will also be touched upon and refreshed.
